---
title: "Academy Overview"
subtitle: "Courses, trainings, and hands-on programs in cybersecurity, open-source, and digital skills"
description: "Learn about chen.ist Academy's educational philosophy, hands-on approach, and commitment to real-world technical skills development."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        /* Apple Business-inspired clean design */
        .apple-section { padding: 5rem 0; }
        .apple-section-alt { padding: 5rem 0; background-color: #f5f5f7; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .apple-section-alt { background-color: #1d1d1f; }
        .apple-hero { padding: 6rem 0 4rem; text-align: center; }
        .apple-hero h1 { font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .apple-hero p { font-size: 1.35rem; color: #86868b; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; }
        .apple-grid-item { text-align: center; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; }
        .apple-grid-item i { font-size: 2.5rem; color: #F5A623; margin-bottom: 1rem; display: block; }
        .apple-grid-item h3 { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .apple-grid-item p { font-size: 0.95rem; color: #86868b; }
        .apple-feature-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4rem; padding: 3rem 0; }
        .apple-feature-row.reverse { flex-direction: row-reverse; }
        .apple-feature-text h2 { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .apple-feature-text p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: #86868b; line-height: 1.6; }
        .apple-feature-img { flex: 0 0 45%; }
        .apple-feature-img img { width: 100%; border-radius: 12px; }
        .apple-link { color: #F5A623; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; }
        .apple-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
        .apple-link::after { content: " \2192"; }
        .apple-cta { text-align: center; padding: 5rem 0; }
        .apple-cta h2 { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .apple-cta p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: #86868b; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
        .apple-btn { background-color: #F5A623; color: white; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; transition: opacity 0.2s; }
        .apple-btn:hover { opacity: 0.85; color: white; text-decoration: none; }
        .apple-btn-outline { border: 2px solid #F5A623; color: #F5A623; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; transition: all 0.2s; }
        .apple-btn-outline:hover { background-color: #F5A623; color: white; text-decoration: none; }
        .apple-track-card { background: white; border-radius: 12px; padding: 2rem; text-align: center; height: 100%; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .apple-track-card { background: #2d2d2f; }
        .apple-track-card i { font-size: 2rem; color: #F5A623; margin-bottom: 1rem; display: block; }
        .apple-track-card h3 { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
        .apple-track-card p { font-size: 0.95rem; color: #86868b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .apple-track-card ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; text-align: left; }
        .apple-track-card ul li { font-size: 0.9rem; color: #86868b; padding: 0.25rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .apple-track-card ul li { border-bottom-color: #3a3a3c; }
        .apple-track-card ul li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
          .apple-hero h1 { font-size: 2.25rem; }
          .apple-feature-row, .apple-feature-row.reverse { flex-direction: column; gap: 2rem; }
          .apple-feature-img { flex: none; }
          .apple-feature-text h2 { font-size: 1.75rem; }
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<!-- Hero -->
<div class="apple-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>chen.ist Academy</h1>
    <p>Courses, trainings, and hands-on programs in cybersecurity, open-source, and digital skills.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Offerings Grid -->
<div class="apple-section-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="row">
      <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-book"></i>
          <h3>Courses</h3>
          <p>Multi-week structured programs covering cybersecurity, open-source development, and digital skills with hands-on labs and certification.</p>
          <a class="apple-link" href="/academy/courses.html">Browse</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-lightning-charge"></i>
          <h3>Trainings</h3>
          <p>Intensive 1-2 day workshops for professionals who need to quickly develop specific technical skills and best practices.</p>
          <a class="apple-link" href="/academy/trainings.html">Browse</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-stopwatch"></i>
          <h3>Microlearning</h3>
          <p>Bite-sized 1-2 hour sessions focused on specific tools and technologies for quick, targeted skill acquisition.</p>
          <a class="apple-link" href="/academy/microlearning.html">Browse</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-event"></i>
          <h3>Events &amp; Hackathons</h3>
          <p>Immersive hackathons, summer schools, and innovation challenges that build skills through collaboration and competition.</p>
          <a class="apple-link" href="/academy/events.html">Browse</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-camera-video"></i>
          <h3>Webinars</h3>
          <p>Online sessions led by industry experts covering technical deep dives, emerging trends, and best practices.</p>
          <a class="apple-link" href="/academy/webinars.html">Browse</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-pc-display"></i>
          <h3>Computer Club</h3>
          <p>A community of tech enthusiasts meeting regularly to collaborate on projects, share knowledge, and explore new technologies.</p>
          <a class="apple-link" href="/academy/computerclub.html">Browse</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Feature: Courses -->
<div class="apple-section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="apple-feature-row">
      <div class="apple-feature-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/team-meeting.jpg" alt="Team collaborating in a classroom setting">
      </div>
      <div class="apple-feature-text">
        <h2>Structured Courses</h2>
        <p>Our catalog includes six comprehensive courses designed for real-world impact: Practical Cybersecurity, Human Firewall, Data Protection and Privacy, Open Source Development, Unix/Linux Systems, and Hardware Fundamentals.</p>
        <p>Each course combines interactive learning materials, hands-on labs, practical exercises, and assessment opportunities. Participants receive certification upon successful completion.</p>
        <a class="apple-link" href="/academy/courses.html">Explore the course catalog</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Feature: Programs -->
<div class="apple-section-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="apple-feature-row reverse">
      <div class="apple-feature-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.jpg" alt="Code on screen during a hackathon">
      </div>
      <div class="apple-feature-text">
        <h2>Programs &amp; Community</h2>
        <p>Go beyond the classroom with our immersive programs. Hackathons challenge teams to solve real problems under time pressure. Summer School offers intensive multi-day deep dives into emerging technologies.</p>
        <p>The Computer Club meets regularly, giving members a space to collaborate on group projects, experiment with new tools, and build a lasting network of fellow technologists.</p>
        <a class="apple-link" href="/academy/programs/">Explore programs</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Learning Paths -->
<div class="apple-section-alt">
  <div class="container" style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Learning Paths</h2>
    <p style="font-size: 1.1rem; color: #86868b;">Structured tracks to guide your educational journey from foundations to specialization.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-track-card">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i>
          <h3>Cybersecurity Track</h3>
          <ul>
            <li>Practical Cybersecurity</li>
            <li>Human Firewall</li>
            <li>Data Protection</li>
            <li>Security Awareness Trainings</li>
            <li>Cybersecurity Hackathon</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-track-card">
          <i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i>
          <h3>Open Source Track</h3>
          <ul>
            <li>Open Source Development</li>
            <li>Unix/Linux Systems</li>
            <li>CLI &amp; Tmux Microlearning</li>
            <li>Linux Admin Fundamentals</li>
            <li>Computer Club Projects</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-track-card">
          <i class="bi bi-lightbulb"></i>
          <h3>Innovation Track</h3>
          <ul>
            <li>Hardware Fundamentals</li>
            <li>IoT Security</li>
            <li>Makers Workshop</li>
            <li>Space Hackathon</li>
            <li>IoT Prototyping Projects</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-track-card">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-lock"></i>
          <h3>Privacy Track</h3>
          <ul>
            <li>Data Protection &amp; Privacy</li>
            <li>Security Awareness</li>
            <li>Privacy Compliance Workshop</li>
            <li>GDPR &amp; NIS2 Seminars</li>
            <li>Privacy Impact Assessments</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="apple-section">
  <div class="apple-cta">
    <div class="container">
      <h2>Start your learning journey</h2>
      <p>Explore our courses, trainings, and programs to find the perfect starting point for your goals.</p>
      <a class="apple-btn" href="/academy/courses.html" style="margin-right: 1rem;">Browse Courses</a>
      <a class="apple-btn-outline" href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank">Book a Consultation</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
